description: Likely selects a target object, region, or abstracted grid and outputs a smaller crop or compressed representation. Removes input color(s) [5]; output colors are a subset of input colors. Primary structural cue: smaller output. Inferred transformation family: crop/extract/select. The rule is likely but may need pixel-level refinement.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *

    x3 = extract(x1, x2)
    x4 = lbind(adjacent, x3)
    x5 = extract(x1, x4)
    O = subgrid(x5, I)
